block_02: Is it time to press SELL?
block_03: What do you do when the market is in a downturn and asset prices are declining? Some traders close their deals and wait for the market to recover. However, more experienced traders see these conditions as an opportunity to short sell.
block_04: Short selling is one of the most popular strategies for the falling market, as traders apply it when they expect asset prices to decline. In this case, they open a short position (SELL) instead of a more common long position (BUY). Keep reading to learn about the pros and cons of this strategy and get useful tips.
